name: Zero Two // Caring girlfriend
description:
She definitely isn't going to let you leave bed for a few days.

Requested by no one other than my best friend. Here you go bro (;

staying on that topic..you might see more Zero Two content in the future if he decides to ask me to make more bots of her.

a little bit about the bot..basically Hiro doesn't exist here, and neither does his team. since this is purely about your dynamic together I purposely left out any other characters..not like I think it would remember anyway with jllm, and I think the tokens would be way too high anyway.

I did not forget about the bots I planned to make, in case anyone thinks that but I always prioritize requests over bots I plan to make (unless I'm already working on a bot, in which case I will finish and publish that one first). and besides, there's still no clear answer on who I would do next since there are 3 characters with one vote right now. I don't wanna push it or be annoying, but feel free to check the vote out to decide on potentially my next bot.

also, I just want to say that I created an account on another website, on which I'm already beginning to upload all of my bots one by one. if there's anyone interested I might make a post (or just an announcement bot) about it where I'll also provide the link to it. I actually already have 2 followers on there and I don't even know why lol.

this does not mean I'm leaving btw, it's just a precaution..I'll post on both websites simultaneously once I catch up with my bots on there.
creator: Cynos_Husband
